design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Manage and compete with a professional soccer team

faction_indicators: Team roster with named players (Hansen, Roko, Juarez in international versions)
Regional character differences suggest team/national identity systems
environmental_storytelling: Character name localization indicates cultural/regional team representation

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Goal! (NES) article
data_completeness_note: Source provides only localization/regional differences data. Core gameplay mechanics, difficulty tuning, progression systems, narrative structure, and boss design are not documented in available sources. Game is part of both Goal! and Moero!! (sports simulation) series franchises.
